actions.script: String serviceName = bookTypeEnumId == 'SvBookPurchases' ? 'sv.localization.IvaBookServices.get#IvaPurchasesBookSummary' : 'sv.localization.IvaBookServices.get#IvaSalesBookSummary' Map summary = ec.service.sync().name(serviceName) .parameters([organizationPartyId:organizationPartyId, periodYearMonth:periodYearMonth]).call() ivaBookTotals = summary.totals ?: [:] ivaBookTypeEnumId = bookTypeEnumId ivaBookTitle = bookTypeEnumId == 'SvBookPurchases' ? 'Libro IVA Compras' : 'Libro IVA Ventas' generatedAt = ec.user.nowTimestamp.toString() templateLocation = bookTypeEnumId == 'SvBookPurchases' ? 'component://moqui-sv-localization/template/book/IvaPurchasesBook.xsl-fo.ftl' : 'component://moqui-sv-localization/template/book/IvaSalesBook.xsl-fo.ftl'
